# Mobile Golf Carts

> Premium mobile golf cart lithium battery conversion service based in Oklahoma.
> Owner: Gary Russell | Phone: (405) 520-3268 | Email: G.russellcarts@gmail.com
> Website: https://www.mobilegolfcarts.com

## What We Do

We convert golf carts from old lead-acid batteries to modern LiFePO4 lithium batteries.
We come to you — your home, golf club, or storage facility. No drop-off required.

## What's Included (Starting at $1,600 Installed)

- 36V LiFePO4 105Ah Lithium Battery
- Custom Battery Tray & Floor
- Smart Charger + External Charging Port
- LCD Battery Monitor (shows exact charge %)
- Professional Mobile Installation (parts + labor)

## Why Upgrade to Lithium

- 6,000+ charge cycle lifespan (10+ years)
- Up to 50 miles per charge
- More power and speed, especially uphill
- 60% lighter than lead-acid — better ride
- No maintenance, no watering, no corrosion
- Plug in at home with a standard outlet

## Compatible Golf Carts

- EZGO: TXT, RXV, Medalist
- Club Car: DS, Precedent, Onward
- Yamaha: G-Series, Drive, Drive2
- Other 36V carts may also qualify — contact us to confirm

## Pricing

- Starting at $1,600 installed (parts + labor)
- Final price depends on cart voltage and configuration
- Higher-voltage carts may require additional components

## Service Area

Oklahoma — including Oklahoma City, Edmond, Tulsa, Norman, Lawton, McAlester, Eufaula, and surrounding areas.
Contact us to confirm service to your location.

## Customer Reviews (5.0 ★)

- Mike T. (Eufaula, OK | EZGO TXT): "Gary did an amazing job. Came out to my house, had the whole thing done in a few hours. Cart runs better than it ever did with the old lead-acid."
- Sandra R. (McAlester, OK | Club Car Precedent): "Super professional from start to finish. The LCD monitor is a game changer — I always know exactly how much charge I have left."
- Dave K. (Edmond, OK | Yamaha Drive2): "Outstanding value. $1,600 all-in and you get a battery that'll last 10+ years. The cart is noticeably faster going up hills now."

## FAQ

- How long does installation take? Most installs are completed in 1 day on-site.
- How long will the battery last? 10+ years / 6,000+ charge cycles.
- Can I charge at home? Yes — standard outlet, smart charger included.
- How much farther will I go? Up to 50 miles per charge vs ~20 with lead-acid.
- What if my cart is a different voltage? Contact us — we handle different configurations.
- Do you service outside Oklahoma? Reach out and ask about our current service radius.
